intro_text: The sun is hot on r_c's pelt as {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/follow/follows} p_l to what's apparently a 'really good spot' for herbs. r_c doesn't know what makes one spot better than any other, but {PRONOUN/r_c/subject}{VERB/r_c/'re/'s} just happy to have the chance to help p_l. As p_l dives into the greenery, as enthusiastic as any proud hunter, a brilliant yellow and black butterfly lands right on {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} raised butt.
decline_text: It's not meant to be — a yowl interrupts their herbal hunt. The Clan needs p_l back at camp.

success_outcomes.text: Uh. Does p_l realize where it landed? r_c stifles a laugh, choking it into a purr as {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/help/helps} p_l escape {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} inappropriately placed unwanted passenger, gently batting the butterfly off {PRONOUN/p_l/object}. p_l should take it as a compliment, {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/suggest/suggests}. {PRONOUN/r_c/subject/CAP} {VERB/r_c/don't/doesn't} blame the butterfly for mistaking p_l for a beautiful flower.

log.cats_from: cat_from and cat_to shared a moment of amusement when a butterfly landed on p_l's haunches. r_c didn't blame the butterfly for mistaking p_l for a beautiful flower.

success_outcomes.text: Err... A little help? p_l asks, and r_c pads closer, helplessly aware that there's absolutely no dignified way to remove an insect from another cat's hindquarters. If p_l could just — no, maybe if r_c moves around — whoops, no, and they both fall instead, butterfly fluttering smugly off as r_c tries not to die of embarrassment on {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} back in the flowers with p_l smiling so prettily.

log.cats_from: cat_from and cat_to shared a moment of amusement when r_c struggled to bat a butterfly away from p_l.

fail_outcomes.text: Try as {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} might, r_c is more of a hindrance than a help for herb-hunting, and {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/know/knows} it, apologizing profusely. p_l waves it off with flick of {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} tail, but it's not what either cat was hoping for from the afternoon.

log.cats_from: cat_from found cat_to more of a hindrance than a help while gathering herbs together.
cat_from was embarrassed when {PRONOUN/cat_from/subject} failed to help cat_to gather any herbs.

intro_text: p_l is on a mission to find herbs. {PRONOUN/p_l/subject/CAP} {VERB/p_l/know/knows} a nice place where mullein grows in a grassy clearing, and it's always good to have some on paw for coughs and sore throats.
decline_text: A cat grabs p_l's attention before {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} can leave camp.

success_outcomes.text: p_l is relieved to find that the mullein is still intact. {PRONOUN/p_l/subject/CAP} {VERB/p_l/knock/knocks} a stray weevil off of a leaf as {PRONOUN/p_l/subject}{VERB/p_l/'re/'s} gathering the herb.

Not only is the mullein intact and growing nicely, but there's also a nice patch of plantain growing just nearby. p_l purrs in satisfaction — seems like {PRONOUN/p_l/subject}{VERB/p_l/'ve/'s} caught two prey in one blow on this trip. {PRONOUN/p_l/subject/CAP}'ll remember that plantain for later.

fail_outcomes.text: p_l reaches the mullein plant that the Clan has used for many seasons, only to find out it's being torn to shreds by bugs. {PRONOUN/p_l/subject/CAP} {VERB/p_l/hiss/hisses} in exasperation, batting some of the leaf bugs off the plant. Maybe it'll grow back next newleaf.

intro_text: p_l sets off to find the bulbs of a corpse lily, so that app1 can learn both risk and reward.
decline_text: p_l considers the dangers of exposing app1 to lilies, even for a lesson, and decides not to risk it.

success_outcomes.text: p_l finds a cluster of corpse lilies, wilting. The flowers, red and spindly, droop towards the floor. p_l steers clear, but has a productive session telling app1 about their memory-enhancing effects.

log.cats_from: p_l taught app1 about the dangers and uses of corpse lilies, and app1 listened carefully.

success_outcomes.text: There's plenty of corpse lilies here, and p_l can only be thankful the pollen can be washed off with moss, and that app1 hung back while {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/explain/explains} the strange effects of poison.

log.cats_from: p_l taught app1 about the effects of corpse lilies' poison, and app1 listened carefully.

fail_outcomes.text: p_l moves at the wrong time, pollen whipped up by the warm wind. Luckily, app1 warns {PRONOUN/p_l/object} about the cloud of red-tinted pollen before it descends, sending the two back to camp, worse for wear.

log.cats_from: app1 wondered why p_l would expose both {PRONOUN/p_l/self} and app1 to a poisonous flower.

history_text.death: m_c was poisoned by a corpse lily.

fail_outcomes.text: p_l moves at the wrong time, pollen whipped up by the warm wind. Still, {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/find/finds} {PRONOUN/p_l/self} trudging on — only to collapse a few heartbeats later.

history_text.death: This cat was poisoned by a corpse lily.
